name: yugioh-card-info
description: Yu-Gi-Oh! card search tools and skills powered by the public YGOPRODeck API.

interface.longDescription: Yu-Gi-Oh! Card Info adds card lookup, monster filters, archetype search, set listings, banlist helpers, and YGOPRODeck database metadata through a local MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Find Dragon monsters with ATK above 2500.
Search cards from the Blue-Eyes archetype.
